Date of Birth: ---
SS#:

Equifax Information Services LLC
P.O. Box 740256
Atlanta, GA 30374-0256

05/29/2026

Re: Request to Rectify Incorrect Credit Details

To Whom It May Concern:

Upon reviewing my credit report, I have identified discrepancies in the following item(s):

1. The following information is outdated. I would like it removed from my credit history report
ACIMA DIGITAL FKA SIMP
Account Number:
    Please remove it from my credit report.

In accordance with the Fair Credit Reporting Act, I urge a thorough investigation and deletion of these inaccuracies from my report. It is my understanding that you will verify these entries with the relevant creditor. Kindly expunge any data that cannot be substantiated by the creditor. Pursuant to 15 U.S.C. Sec. 1681i(a), I expect this reevaluation to be completed within 30 days of receiving this correspondence.

Please forward an updated copy of my credit report to the provided address at no cost as mandated by the legislation. Additionally, I request notifications of corrections to any recipients of my credit report in the preceding six months.

I appreciate your attention and assistance in resolving this issue.

Yours sincerely,


AI letter Automation
